ogTitle: Tootool vs Toowoon Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Tootool vs Toowoon Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tootool, New South Wales and Toowoon Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tootool has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Toowoon Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tootool or Toowoon Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tootool has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Toowoon Bay scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tootool scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Toowoon Bay scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tootool or Toowoon Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tootool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
